generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance OccupancyActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuates lighting and HVAC systems based on occupancy status from BIM-enriched building elements"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Controls lighting schedules and dimming levels via BIM-embedded control logic for energy optimization"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Adjusts HVAC systems (temperature, ventilation) based on real-time environmental data and predictive analytics"
]

instance SmartThermostat : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Smart IoT-enabled thermostat integrating with BIM for adaptive climate control and energy efficiency"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy occupancy detector embedded in building infrastructure feeding real-time occupancy status to DT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyData
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature/humidity sensor measuring environmental parameters (occupancy status, thermal conditions) in real-time"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalParameters
]

instance MotionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motion detection sensor providing real-time occupancy movement data for adaptive building control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotionData
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy meter tracking real-time power consumption of building subsystems (lighting, HVAC) for performance analytics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyMetrics
]

instance CO2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Indoor air quality sensor monitoring CO₂ levels for IEQ optimization and ventilation control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirQualityData
]

// C4: Data Transmission
instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalParameters : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance MotionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotionSensor
]

instance EnergyMetrics : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

instance AirQualityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CO2Sensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMEnrichedModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Static BIM model enriched with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) and control logic embedded within BIM elements"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTooling
]

instance PhysicsBasedSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based simulation model (energy/thermal performance) generated via Unreal Engine for interactive validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven control logic representation for adaptive building systems (lighting/HVAC schedules) embedded in BIM"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTooling
]

instance RealTimeOperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time operational data from sensors and middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for DT synchronization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyData, EnvironmentalParameters, MotionData, EnergyMetrics, AirQualityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance BIMExtractedBCSData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Semantically extracted Building Control System (BCS) metadata from BIM models for DT semantics alignment"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMEnrichedModel
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMTooling : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools (Revit/ArchiCAD) for device modeling and BCS integration within building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:enables BIMEnrichedModel, ControlLogicModel
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated MDE pipelines transforming BIM models into runtime DT artifacts (service interfaces, control logic)"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicsBasedSimulation, BIMExtractedBCSData
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware framework for real-time bidirectional data exchange between physical sensors/actuators and DT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeOperationalData
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization and physics-based simulation of building operational state"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicsBasedSimulation
]

instance StandardizedExtensionPoints : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular extension points for DT engineers to deploy domain-specific plugins (e.g., reinforcement learning control policies)"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomReinforcementLearningService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring of building operational parameters (occupancy, energy, environmental conditions) via Unreal Engine visualization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupancyStatusInsight, EnvironmentalMetricsInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates predictive analytics for energy consumption, IEQ, and operational efficiency using BIM-extracted BCS semantics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyForecastingInsight, OccupantBehaviorModel
]

instance AdaptiveOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements adaptive control policies (lighting/HVAC) via reinforcement learning (BOREALIS project) for dynamic optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyUpdateAction, EnergyEfficiencyAction
]

instance CustomReinforcementLearningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Domain-specific plugin for reinforcement learning-based control policies deployed via standardized extension points"
    DTDFVocab:provides RLControlPolicyAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupancyStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy status derived from motion/occupancy sensors for adaptive building control decisions"
]

instance EnvironmentalMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indoor environmental quality metrics (temperature, humidity, CO₂ levels) for IEQ optimization"
]

instance EnergyForecastingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive energy consumption forecasting using historical BIM-extracted BCS data and real-time sensor inputs"
]

instance OccupantBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling of occupants based on occupancy patterns and sensor data for personalized building control"
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of control policies (lighting/HVAC schedules) based on predictive analytics and reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic energy-saving measures (HVAC optimization, lighting adjustments) triggered by DT insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RLControlPolicyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deployment of reinforcement learning-based control policies via standardized extension points for adaptive optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Facilitates **real-time control signals** from the DT to physical building systems via standardized APIs integrated with middleware (e.g., Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The DT generates control commands (e.g., actuator triggers, lighting schedules) based on optimized policies (e.g., energy-efficient lighting control) and sends them back to the physical infrastructure for execution."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Operates on a **real-time to near-real-time** time scale, with synchronization rates determined by sensor data acquisition frequencies (e.g., 1–10 Hz for critical sensors like temperature/humidity) and DT service processing cycles. The framework ensures **low-latency bidirectional communication** (e.g., <100ms for control commands) to maintain fidelity between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A **service-oriented DT architecture** with a **centralized control hub** (DT Framework) orchestrating:
  - **BIM-based BCS components** (e.g., sensors, actuators) as core assets.
  - **Middleware layers** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data synchronization.
  - **Interactive visualization** (Unreal Engine) as a user-facing interface.
  - **Modular services** (e.g., optimization, analytics) deployed via extension points, enabling a **scalable, composable DT ecosystem** for AECO applications. The constellation ensures **interoperability** with external systems (e.g., IoT platforms) via standardized APIs."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers the entire **building life cycle**, from:
  - **Design phase**: BIM-based modeling of static building geometry, spatial relationships, and device configurations.
  - **Construction phase**: Integration of BIM with IoT sensors and middleware for initial device commissioning.
  - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, adaptive control (e.g., BOREALIS reinforcement learning), and data-driven optimization (e.g., energy efficiency, occupant comfort).
  The DT evolves dynamically, with runtime adjustments enabled by middleware (e.g., Ditto) and service extensions (e.g., DT engineers adding new analytics)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Ensures high fidelity and validity through:
  - **Semantic alignment**: BIM models are enriched with runtime semantics (e.g., sensor configurations, control logic) to minimize **semantic drift** (e.g., via MDE-driven transformations).
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) ensures low-latency data exchange (<100ms) to maintain physical-virtual coherence.
  - **Validation**: The **ODTE metric** evaluates the DT’s entanglement with the physical building, quantifying interoperability and architectural fidelity.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Runtime data validation and error correction mechanisms (e.g., sensor redundancy) mitigate data inaccuracies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Utilizes **network protocols** for bidirectional communication:
  - **Eclipse Hono** and **Ditto** middleware for IoT device connectivity (e.g., MQTT, CoAP) and real-time data streaming.
  - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful interfaces) for DT-to-physical system control commands.
  - **Unreal Engine’s networking layer** for interactive visualization synchronization with the physical building.
  The architecture supports **decentralized twinning** via BIM-based segmentation, enabling scalable deployment across multiple physical assets."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Deployed as a **scalable, cloud-native DT platform** with:
  - **Modular service hosting**: Extension points allow DT engineers to deploy custom services (e.g., analytics, control logic) without redeploying the core DT framework.
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) ensures low-latency data exchange between physical sensors and the DT.
  - **Interactive visualization**: Unreal Engine provides a **3D immersive environment** for monitoring and control, integrated with BIM models.
  The deployment is **BIM-centric**, leveraging BIM metadata for automated device modeling and runtime interface generation."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Enables **interoperability with external systems** via:
  - **Standardized APIs** (e.g., RESTful, MQTT) for integration with IoT platforms, BIM tools, and third-party analytics.
  - **Middleware bridges** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to connect with legacy BCS or external sensors.
  - **BIM-based semantic alignment** to ensure compatibility with other AECO stakeholders’ models (e.g., Revit, ArchiCAD).
  The framework supports **horizontal data exchange** for cross-DT collaboration (e.g., sharing optimization insights across buildings)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents, but implied to follow **AECO industry standards** for data governance:
  - **Physical twin (PT) ownership**: Sensor data and operational logs are typically owned by the building operator or facility manager.
  - **DT service provider ownership**: Custom services (e.g., analytics, control logic) developed by DT engineers may retain ownership of derived insights.
  - **Privacy considerations**: Middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) may enforce **end-to-end encryption** and **data anonymization** for sensitive operational data (e.g., occupancy patterns). The framework prioritizes **compliance with AECO regulations** (e.g., GDPR for privacy) and **secure data transmission** protocols."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adheres to:
  - **BIM standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) for semantic modeling and interoperability.
  - **AECO industry protocols** (e.g., IFC 4.0 for BIM data exchange).
  - **Digital Twin standards** (e.g., OGC Digital Twin Framework) for interoperability with other DT systems.
  - **Middleware standards** (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) for real-time data exchange.
  - **Unreal Engine’s industry-validated APIs** for interactive visualization.
  The framework includes **standardized extension points** for modular service integration, ensuring compatibility with future AECO standards."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Implements:
  - **Network security**: Encryption (e.g., TLS) for data in transit, authentication (e.g., OAuth) for DT service access.
  - **Physical safety**: Remote control commands are validated via middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto) to prevent unauthorized actuator triggers.
  - **Operational safety**: Real-time monitoring (Unreal Engine) enables immediate detection of anomalies (e.g., sensor failures) and triggers automated recovery protocols.
  - **Compliance**: Adherence to AECO safety regulations (e.g., fire suppression systems, emergency lighting) via BIM-embedded control logic.
  The DT framework ensures **remote operation safety** by enforcing access controls and audit logs for all DT services. "
]
